title: [TC]: Check that the search input accepts small and capital letters
author: CrisA24
userStoryLabel: US11 : As a user, I want to search for jobs using different criteria (e.g., company, location, work mode, industry) so that I can see job listings matching my criteria
description: The case to be tested is that the search input accepts small and capital letters.
descriptionExcerpt: The case to be tested is that the search input accepts small and capital letters.
